Name: ANavigationData
Description:
Represents abstract Navigation Data (sub-classed as NavMesh, NavGraph, etc)
 	Used as a common interface for all navigation types handled by NavigationSystem

Variables.Name: bEnableDrawing
Variables.Description: if set to true then this navigation data will be drawing itself when requested as part of "show navigation"

Variables.Name: bForceRebuildOnLoad
Variables.Description:
By default navigation will skip the first update after being successfully loaded
	  setting bForceRebuildOnLoad to false can override this behavior

Variables.Name: bCanBeMainNavData
Variables.Description: If set, navigation data can act as default one in navigation system's queries

Variables.Name: bCanSpawnOnRebuild
Variables.Description: If set, navigation data will be spawned in persistent level during rebuild if actor doesn't exist

Variables.Name: bRebuildAtRuntime_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: If true, the NavMesh can be dynamically rebuilt at runtime.

Variables.Name: ObservedPathsTickInterval
Variables.Description: all observed paths will be processed every ObservedPathsTickInterval seconds
